name: fraudpulse
description: Local real-time fraud detection system with streaming events, explainable scoring, and risk operations dashboard.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @fraudpulse/shared && npm run build -w @fraudpulse/web && npm run build -w @fraudpulse/api && npm run build -w @fraudpulse/simulator && npm run build -w @fraudpulse/worker
